recommendations.title: The Postman Always Rings Twice
recommendations.overview: A married woman and a drifter fall in love, then plot to murder her husband.

recommendations.title: How I Fell in Love with a Gangster
recommendations.overview: A mysterious woman recounts the rise and fall of Nikodem "Nikoś" Skotarczak, one of the biggest gangsters in Poland's history. Inspired by a true story.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Monday
recommendations.overview: A spark on a Friday can lead to a sizzling weekend fling, but what happens when you get to the inevitable Monday?

recommendations.title: Renoir
recommendations.overview: In the French Riviera in the summer of 1915, Jean Renoir, son of the Impressionist painter Pierre-Auguste, returns home to convalesce after being wounded in World War I. At his side is Andrée, a young woman who rejuvenates, enchants, and inspires bot

recommendations.title: Freedom Writers
recommendations.overview: A young teacher inspires her class of at-risk students to learn tolerance, apply themselves, and pursue education beyond high school.

recommendations.title: Vincent N Roxxy
recommendations.overview: A small town loner and a rebellious punk rocker unexpectedly fall in love as they are forced on the run and soon discover violence follows them everywhere.

recommendations.title: Werckmeister Harmonies
recommendations.overview: A naive young man witnesses an escalation of violence in his small hometown following the arrival of a mysterious circus attraction.

recommendations.title: Toscana
recommendations.overview: When a Danish chef travels to Tuscany to sell his father's business, he meets a local woman who inspires him to rethink his approach to life and love.

recommendations.title: Dot the I
recommendations.overview: A fiery Spanish woman is about to marry a kind British man when she meets a Brazilian actor who ignites in her a flame of lust she can't ignore.
